jobs.title: Account Executive, Fund Administration
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Carta</strong></p><p>Carta is the equity-management platform powering venture-backed startups, late-stage privates, and the funds that finance them. The Fund Administration team partners with the largest GP/LP investors in Australia&rsquo;s private markets to ship cap-table, valuation, and fund-services data on the Carta Cap Table and Carta Fund Administration surfaces.</p></div><p>You'll prospect, qualify, and develop the top-of-funnel pipeline for the Carta Fund Administration book of business across Australia and APAC.</p>

jobs.title: Business Development Manager, Private Equity
jobs.content: <h2><strong>Business Development Manager, Private Equity</strong></h2><p>At Carta, we make private markets liquid. Our mission is to create the most personalised cap-table and equity-management experiences on earth. The Private Equity team partners with the largest GP/LP investors across the United States to ship private-equity-fund administration on the Carta Marketplace.</p><p>You'll prospect, qualify, and develop the top-of-funnel pipeline for the Carta Private Equity book of business across North America.</p>
